name: Chilled Curried Pumpkin Soup
recipeIngredient: 3/4 Cup sliced green onion, white part only
2 Cups milk, half & half or whipping cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 4 to 6 quart saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion and sauté until soft and golden brown.
3. Stir in pumpkin, stock, bay leaf, sugar, curry powder, and parsley.
4. Bring mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat and continue simmering uncovered for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Transfer soup in batches to a blender or food processor and puree.
6. Return to saucepan and add milk, and salt and pepper to taste.
7. Simmer for 5 to 10 minutes, but do not allow to boil.
8. To serve hot, ladle into individual bowls. Float a dollop of cream on each and sprinkle with paprika. Top with chives.
9. To serve cold, chill soup thoroughly then ladle into individual bowls. Float a tomato slice on top, cover with a dollop of cream, and sprinkle with minced chives.
